SELECT *, roundDuration(n) FROM (SELECT number AS n FROM system.numbers LIMIT 20);
CREATE TABLE subquery_example AS SELECT roundDuration(num) AS rounded FROM (SELECT number % 20000 AS num FROM system.numbers LIMIT 100);

SELECT d.num, roundDuration(d.num) AS rounded, r.rounded_duration FROM durations d JOIN (SELECT number AS rounded_duration FROM (SELECT number % 36000 AS number FROM system.numbers LIMIT 50)) r ON d.num > 0;
WITH (SELECT DISTINCT roundDuration(num) FROM durations) AS rd SELECT COUNT(*) FROM rd;
WITH (SELECT num FROM durations WHERE num < 100) AS filtered SELECT COUNT(*), roundDuration(num) FROM filtered GROUP BY num;
SELECT *, roundDuration(IF(num < 10, num * 2, num)) AS rounded_conditional FROM durations;
SELECT ROUND(num, 0), roundDuration(ROUND(num, 0)) FROM (SELECT number AS num FROM system.numbers LIMIT 50);
